note: This case is from SQLancer bugs.json. The executable SQL strips report comments; the oracle is the stable signature observed on the current sqlite3 binary.
original_test: CREATE TRIGGER c BEFORE DELETE ON t0;
SELECT t0.c1 BETWEEN 0 AND (CASE WHEN 1 THEN 1 ELSE t0.c0 END NOT NULL) FROM t0; -- expected: 1 and 1, actual: 1
title: Trigger causes query to compute incorrect result
